/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -mavx2 -mfma -O3 -march=native -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -shared -Wl,-soname,libanvil_runtime_core.so -o libanvil_runtime_core.so CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/coconut_bridge_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/model_graph_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/native_kv_cache_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/native_tokenizer_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/unicode_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_runtime_core_obj.dir/split/runtime/core/unicode_data_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/amx_kernels_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/fast_attention_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/simd_ops_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/quantized_matmul_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/qsg_state_kernels_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/qsg_parallel_kernels_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/thread_config_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/numa_topology_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/numa_allocator_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/tinyblas_kernels_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/interleave_weights_wrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/anvil_kernels_obj.dir/split/kernels/tensor_decomposition_kernels_wrap.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnuma.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
